# Fi.Convert.MDtoHTML

Converts Markdown to HTML.

## Usage

```dax
EVALUATE
{
    Fi.Convert.MDtoHTML(
    )
}
```

## Documentation

- See the `lib/functions.tmdl` file for the functions included in this library.
- See the `manifest.daxlib` file for the library metadata and configuration.
